description_long: This object consists of two adjacent metal lockers, one being a single tall unit and the other a wider unit with three separate doors. Both lockers are painted a dark green color and feature vented panels on the doors for airflow, with the vents and edges showing signs of wear and metallic exposure. The lockers stand on short legs, elevating them slightly above the ground, and each door is equipped with a handle for opening. The surfaces are matte with a slightly rough, industrial finish, typical of storage furniture found in urban environments such as schools, gyms, or public facilities. No contents are visible inside the lockers, and the backs are plain and unadorned.
description: A pair of dark green metal lockers, one single and one triple-door, with vented panels and visible handles, standing on short legs with a worn, industrial finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of both lockers, with no visible doors or vents.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the three-door and single-door lockers, vented panels, and handles clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile without visible doors or vents.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the plain, unadorned backs of both lockers.
